rubric: Lists at least 6 vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, Chroma, pgvector)
Names at least 3 key companies or teams behind major vector databases
Covers at least 3 deployment options (managed cloud, self-hosted, embedded)
Includes GitHub star counts or adoption metrics for at least 4 databases
Covers at least 2 benchmark results (e.g., ANN-benchmarks, MTEB, VectorDBBench)
Lists at least 3 RAG-specific features (hybrid search, metadata filtering, reranking integration)
Names at least 2 databases released or significantly updated in last 6 months
Includes at least 1 Chinese-language source or Chinese vector DB project
Covers pricing models for at least 3 managed vector database services
Identifies at least 2 commercial companies offering vector DB as a service
Compares at least 4 vector databases head-to-head on performance, features, or pricing
Identifies at least 1 directional trend in the vector DB space with evidence
Explains tradeoffs between managed vs self-hosted for RAG use cases
States a recommendation for which database to use depending on scale
Discusses at least 2 risks or failure modes of vector databases in production RAG
Provides a taxonomy that organizes the landscape into at least 3 segments
Every mentioned database or paper includes a URL or citation link
Includes an explicit section for gaps or unknowns
Uses sources from at least 3 distinct source types
Includes a comparison table with at least 4 databases and 3+ dimensions
